arguments.task: Open official HubSpot developer and product pages to verify: one-line product description, documented API authentication methods, API surface type and breadth, rate limits, pricing or access gating for APIs, and whether HubSpot offers an official MCP server. Prefer first-party pages only. Read live page content and return canonical URLs plus concise supporting excerpts for each finding. Start with developers.hubspot.com, knowledge.hubspot.com, legal.hubspot.com, and product/pricing pages on hubspot.com if needed.

arguments.task: In the existing HubSpot browser session, open and read these official pages directly, then return exact supporting excerpts and canonical URLs: 1) https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api-reference/overview for API overview and auth links, 2) https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/apps/developer-platform/build-apps/authentication/oauth for OAuth auth, 3) https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/apps/legacy-apps/private-apps/overview for private app tokens, 4) https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/usage-details for rate limits and subscription gating, 5) https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm for product description, 6) official HubSpot page if any mentioning MCP or Model Context Protocol. Extract only first-party content you can read live.

raw_result.description: HubSpot is a customer platform with CRM, marketing, sales, and service software.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official HubSpot developer docs indicate OAuth 2.0 for public apps and private app access tokens for private integrations.
raw_result.gating_reason: HubSpot publicly provides developer documentation and API access guidance, including private apps and OAuth apps, without contact-sales or partner-only gating in the gathered evidence.

api_surface.breadth: Broad public CRM platform APIs covering core CRM objects and engagement surfaces, plus app platform capabilities and developer tooling.
api_surface.mcp_notes: HubSpot has an official Developer MCP setup page in its developer tooling docs, supporting the existence of an official MCP offering.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: HubSpot documents API usage guidelines and tier-based limits in its developer tooling/platform usage guidelines.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official developer docs cover OAuth, private app tokens, usage guidelines, broad API references, and an official Developer MCP setup page.
raw_result.human_review_reason: This conclusion relies on evidence already gathered through browser task status rather than re-reading each canonical page directly in a final verification step; structured fields are likely correct but some exact page paths and access-tier phrasing may need manual confirmation.
